mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payout_account ( trainer_id, trainer_type, gym_id, commission_rate, business_registration_num, resident_registration_num, bank_name, account_number, is_active ) VALUES ( #{trainerId}, #{trainerType}, #{gymId}, #{commissionRate}, #{businessRegistrationNum}, #{residentRegistrationNum}, #{bankName}, #{accountNumber}, 1 )
mapper.select: SELECT id, trainer_id AS trainerId, trainer_type AS trainerType, gym_id AS gymId, commission_rate AS commissionRate, business_registration_num AS businessRegistrationNum, resident_registration_num AS residentRegistrationNum, bank_name AS bankName, account_number AS accountNumber, is_active AS active, created_at AS createdAt FROM payout_account WHERE trainer_id = #{trainerId} AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
